model_notes.mimo-v2.5: Default worker. Fast, good for daily implementation.
model_notes.mimo-v2.5-pro: Strong worker. Complex implementation and reasoning.
model_notes.mimo-v2-pro: Older MiMo. Fallback if v2.5 unavailable.
model_notes.mimo-v2-omni: Multimodal MiMo. Use when images/vision needed.
model_notes.deepseek-v4-flash: Very fast. Cheap fallback when MiMo subscription expires.
model_notes.deepseek-v4-pro: Strong DeepSeek. Fallback for complex work.
model_notes.gpt-5.5: Strongest GPT. Reserve for hardest tasks.
model_notes.gpt-5.4: Complex tasks. Good reasoning and code.
model_notes.gpt-5.3-codex: Code-specialized. Good for pure code tasks.
